allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add accordion button card input textarea label form badge sheet separator -y)

Bash(node -e "const lr = require\(''lucide-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k => k[0] === k[0].toUpperCase\(\) && !k.startsWith\(''create''\) && !k.startsWith\(''default''\)\).filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''pen''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''ruler''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''draft''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''compass''\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''blueprint''\)\); console.log\(names\);")
